purpose: Pure-Node implementation of the AI_UNDERSTANDING schema-v1 contract from AI_UNDERSTANDING_FORMAT.md. Provides sha1, glob matching, validators (entry / meta / operation), per-file CRUD, status (fresh/stale/untracked/orphan) computation, and skeleton bootstrap. No vscode dependency — fully unit-testable.
invariants: sha1 is always 40 lowercase hex characters; validateEntry rejects any other shape.
validateOperation enforces the §7 33% mass-edit cap unless {bootstrap:true} is passed.
writeEntry refuses absolute paths and any rel path containing a `..` segment (path-traversal guard).
writeEntry calls validateEntry before fs.writeFileSync — invalid entries never hit disk.
generateSkeleton skips AI_UNDERSTANDING/ itself when walking the tree to avoid recursion.
gotchas: Glob matcher is intentionally minimal (** / * / ? / brace alternation) — no full minimatch features (extglob, negation, etc.).
detectFrameworks reads package.json#engines.vscode + #engines.node; absence of engines but presence of dependencies still emits a generic "Node.js" entry.
computeStatus reads tracked_globs from _meta.json when initialized; falls back to DEFAULT_TRACKED_GLOBS otherwise — changing globs after bootstrap silently re-categorizes files.
The buildAiuInjectionBlock prose is what AI agents actually read each session — wording changes affect agent behavior.

key_functions.name: validateOperation
key_functions.summary: Enforces the spec §7 cross-entry mass-edit cap (≤33% of existing entries) unless bootstrap=true. Path-mirror is enforced at write-time via ensureSafeRelPath; orphan pairing is the hook's job.

key_functions.name: generateSkeleton
key_functions.summary: Walks tracked globs, computes sha1 per file, writes skeleton entries with purpose:"TODO" plus a populated _meta.json. Validator runs in bootstrap mode so the >33% cap is bypassed.

key_functions.name: computeStatus
key_functions.summary: Returns categorized {fresh, stale, untracked, orphan} arrays per spec §6 staleness table; isClean(status) is the project-wide audit-stamp gate.
